# Ixazomib Citrate 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ixazomib Citrate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ixazomib Citrate</strong> 目前有 <strong>12 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ixazomib Citrate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Ninlaro in combination with lenalidomide and dexamethasone is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with multiple myeloma who have received at least one prior therapy.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（96.2%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（94.9%）</li>
<li>CMM7（82.0%）</li>
<li>pediatric leptomeningeal melanoma（80.8%）</li>
<li>vulvar melanoma (disease)（80.3%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell uveal melanoma（79.6%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（73.9%）</li>
<li>melanoma（72.9%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（71.0%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（68.6%）</li>
<li>intellectual disability, autosomal dominant 55, with seizures（62.0%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（61.2%）</li>
<li>fetal growth restriction（60.3%）</li>
<li>epidural abscess（59.6%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（59.6%）</li>
<li>GCGR-related hyperglucagonemia（58.9%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（58.5%）</li>
<li>polydipsia（58.0%）</li>
<li>dental caries（57.0%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（56.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ixazomib-citrate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
